dce_browser.note: DCE official JSON endpoints require a real headed Chrome session so the site JavaScript can attach the dynamic Riversafe token to in-page fetch calls. In headless/server environments use Xvfb or set QUOTE_DCE_CHROME_PATH to a real Chrome binary.

exchange_official.note: Preferred first-hand route for domestic futures daily contract bars. Main-continuous series are constructed locally by open-interest priority; AkShare remains fallback for unsupported, empty, or failed official requests.

official_calendar_backfill.note: Historical exchange calendars are verified from official daily market-data endpoints. Future dates are not weekday-filled unless an official notice source explicitly verifies them.

registry.note: Include the built-in domestic P0 futures universe from the commodity requirements; listed instruments below are explicit overrides/examples.

manual_entries.reason: Manual supplement approved after cross-checking Sina related-data page and other public market-data displays for 688781.SH.
manual_entries.note: Use as a bounded gap-fill override only when authoritative leaf component sets do not cover the stock. The taxonomy match is resolved locally by Shenwan name.
manual_entries.source_classification: 人工确认申万行业补源

name_supplement.note: Only runs for stocks missed by current Shenwan component sets. It maps provider industry names to local Shenwan taxonomy by normalized name; level-2 matches are accepted only when the local taxonomy has no level-3 children for that level-2 node.

standard.note: Only authoritative Shenwan mappings can drive peer grouping or relative valuation. Unmapped raw industry fields remain reference_only.

incremental_sync.note: Daily shareholder incremental mode uses reusable CNInfo announcement scans to select candidate instruments, then writes snapshots only when normalized shareholder content hashes change or required scope is missing. Pending recheck is kept for five calendar days to absorb CNInfo announcement-vs-data20 structured-data lag across weekends and holidays. The same announcement set uses first_pending_at as a hard deadline anchor and is not extended by repeated daily scans.

shareholders.note: Shareholder ingestion is enabled after bounded and full validation passed on 2026-05-23. The target route is cninfo:direct as primary, akshare:proxy_patch as high-availability backup, and direct AkShare/efinance only as last-resort references because Sina/Eastmoney shareholder endpoints can trigger anti-crawl refusal.

candidates.note: Source-level endpoint_candidates include SSE official XBRL commonQuery structured JSON probes. The structured_json parser and configurable core fact aliases are implemented; production stays disabled until bounded live validation and broader backfill readiness pass.

Source-level endpoint_candidates include CNInfo data20 official structured financial JSON for SSE, SZSE, and BSE 920-code instruments. SSE still defaults to the exchange commonQuery profile; CNInfo data20 is available as explicit alternate official evidence, cross-check, or fallback profile. Announcement metadata remains PDF-only evidence and is not a readiness gate.

BSE exchange announcement metadata remains configured for evidence only; representative samples expose PDF files. BSE structured statement ingestion is currently routed through CNInfo data20 920-code official structured JSON until a BSE-hosted XBRL/XML/ZIP artifact is validated.

period_unavailable_alternates.note: Live probe for 600000.SH on 2026-05-15 showed 2023Q4 annual SSE commonQuery rows were structured, while 2024Q4 and 2025Q4 returned HTTP 200 empty payloads and COMMON_MAP_MAXYEAR_L reported annual max year 2023. For latest annual SSE periods, default backfill may select CNInfo data20 unless the operator explicitly requests sse_commonquery.

title_patterns: 风险控制指标相关情况报告

instrument_scope.note: Only instruments with confirmed listed_broker_dealer_scope entries are targeted by default; Shenwan securities membership is a candidate universe only.

incremental.note: Incremental maintenance is invoked as a post-task of financial_disclosure_incremental_sync and writes broker regulatory facts to the hot financial fact tier.

broker_risk_control_reports.note: Broker regulatory facts are integrated into the financial disclosure chain. Annual/semiannual formal reports are the primary source; standalone risk-control reports are supplementary. Regulatory operation-risk revenue rows are stored only under regulatory_risk_control canonical facts and must not be treated as brokerage, investment-banking, asset-management, or proprietary business-line revenue.

disclosure_incremental_sync.note: Financial disclosure incremental and reconciliation maintenance use CNInfo data20 official structured facts first, then THS/Sina only for missing, failed, or semantically ambiguous canonical facts.

financial_statements.note: Official structured_json parsing is implemented for SSE commonQuery and CNInfo data20 SZSE/BSE profiles, but production rollout remains disabled until each profile passes bounded dry-run evidence, production backfill gates, and readiness checks. AkShare remains the configured fallback for missing official periods or facts.

analyst_forecasts.note: Implemented baseline storage/sync/API using AkShare earnings forecast coverage. Keep disabled by default until direct-source rollout and anti-crawl budget are explicitly accepted.

research_reports.note: Implemented as report-metadata coverage only; not a full-text research archive. Keep disabled by default until source stability is validated.

sentiment_events.note: Implemented as event/sentiment metadata baseline. Default disabled until direct-source freshness and event coverage are validated.

input_sync.note: valuation_inputs is populated before valuation_history_rebuild. Daily sync uses CNInfo all-market capital snapshot; full backfill fetches per-symbol CNInfo capital-change events. Values are stored in data/valuation.db and reads never fetch remote sources synchronously.

beta.note: DCF prefers on-demand calculated beta when available. Explicit discount_rate overrides still take precedence; fallback_beta is used only when no calculated beta is available.

Beta is calculated on demand from local quote data. If window_days is omitted, the API returns configured default windows. benchmark_family=all returns deduped market_default, board, market_broad, and industry_sw_l2 results. Stock returns default to qfq-adjusted close from local adjustment_factors; index benchmarks default to unadjusted price-index close. Industry beta requires authoritative sw_l2 membership and local Shenwan index-analysis close_index history.

proxy_patch.note: efinance can use the same proxy patch approach as akshare, but the added availability is not free.
Use only when direct access is unstable or the data domain has no cheaper substitute.

industry_pack.note: Industry-specific financial facts are exposed separately from common L1 facts. Missing values are reported as industry_pack_missing and do not block local-core readiness.

financial_statements.note: Fallback only after official structured sources have missing periods or missing core facts. It must not overwrite higher-priority official facts.

industry_standard.proxy_patch_note: If proxy_patch is used for strict Shenwan memberships, config/03_data.json hook_domains must include legulegu.com.

index_analysis.note: Uses the same SWS index_analysis_report endpoint semantics as AkShare index_analysis_daily_sw, with project-controlled timeout/retry. This is the approved historical date-range source for industry_index_analysis_daily. Units match SWS display units: 成交量 is 100 million shares; percentage fields remain percent values.

endpoint_candidates.note: Observed from SSE official XBRL data page script; sample 600000 annual data returned numeric S2020 fields. Parser maps these field codes to numeric facts and configurable core aliases, while production endpoint use remains disabled.

financial_statements.note: SSE official XBRL commonQuery endpoint candidates are configured and disabled. Live sample 600000 2023Q4 returned structured JSON for income, balance sheet, and cash flow; fetch_all_endpoint_candidates=true is required because each statement family is a separate commonQuery candidate. structured_json parser and core aliases are implemented. Production remains disabled until bounded live sync validation and coverage checks pass.

symbol_aliases.reason: 中航成飞当前交易代码为 302132.SZ；申万官方分类文件仍以旧代码 300114 记录其最新官方分类。
evidence: SWS StockClassifyUse_stock.xls has latest 300114 -> 650501 but no 302132 row as of 2026-04-24 source file.
Local instrument universe marks 302132.SZ 中航成飞 active.

industry_standard.note: Official Shenwan classification files are the primary strict industry taxonomy and membership source. AkShare stock_industry_clf_hist_sw is only a fallback for stock history when direct official download is unavailable.

index_analysis.note: Official latest daily industry index metrics keyed by Shenwan index code; does not create stock memberships. Enabled for daily latest full-dimension refresh. Current observed endpoint ignores historical date filters, so true historical backfill must be validated separately before enabling range rebuild.

industry_standard_supplement.note: f127 returns Eastmoney's stock industry name. For current observed Shenwan steel gaps it returns names such as 特钢Ⅱ, which are mapped by local Shenwan taxonomy name rather than remote code.
Parses Sina Finance related-data pages for current Shenwan index rows. Prefer current 85xxxx level-3 rows, then locally validate level-2 candidates as leaf-only before writing memberships.

shareholders.note: Uses CNInfo official data20 stockholderCapital structured endpoints for top-10 shareholders. Handles HTTP 200 logical rate-limit responses such as resultCode=429 with bounded backoff retries.

valuation_inputs.note: Uses AkShare CNInfo wrappers: stock_hold_change_cninfo(symbol='全部') for daily all-market snapshots and stock_share_change_cninfo(symbol, start_date, end_date) for per-symbol historical capital-change events. CNInfo share-count fields are 10k shares and are converted to raw shares before persistence.

announcement_scan.note: Reusable CNInfo announcement metadata scanner. Domain workflows provide their own filter rules and purpose-specific watermarks.

context_resolvers.note: Resolves CNInfo orgId for announcement metadata discovery. It is not a financial data source by itself; only XBRL/XML/ZIP/structured JSON artifacts can satisfy promotion gates.

Resolves the CNInfo data20 financial statement schema sign used by getIncomeStatement/getBalanceSheets/getCashFlowStatement. The returned financial endpoints are official structured JSON; statement amounts are parsed as CNY after applying the documented 10k-yuan page unit scale.

endpoint_candidates.note: Official CNInfo data20 income statement JSON. Parser filters the requested report_period bucket/year and scales statement values from 10k CNY to CNY.
Official CNInfo data20 balance sheet JSON. Parser filters the requested report_period bucket/year and scales statement values from 10k CNY to CNY.
Official CNInfo data20 cash-flow statement JSON. Parser filters the requested report_period bucket/year and scales statement values from 10k CNY to CNY.

OrgId-aware metadata returns annual-report records for representative SZSE symbols, but observed attachments are PDF-only. PDF files are discovery evidence only and cannot satisfy official structured source readiness.

financial_statements.note: CNInfo data20 official structured financial JSON is configured for SZSE and BSE 920-code instruments and remains disabled until bounded parser/backfill validation passes. Announcement metadata is still retained as PDF-only evidence and does not satisfy readiness by itself.

endpoint_candidates.note: Official page script exposes companyAnnouncement.do. Current sample query returned no annual-report artifacts; BSE remains optional-empty and disabled.

financial_statements.note: BSE company announcement metadata endpoint is configured and disabled. Current representative sample remains metadata/manifest-only; BSE stays optional-empty until structured artifact evidence and parser compatibility are confirmed.
